## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `cd src-tauri && cargo test`
- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue or kanban card.
- [ ] Atomic scope; unrelated changes kept out.
- [ ] Tests or explicit rationale for no tests.
- [ ] Docs updated for user-visible behavior.
- [ ] New capabilities, sidecars, or network calls justified.
- [ ] No secrets, local registries, project paths, or generated binaries committed.
